name: Leapwork
description: Leapwork — Visual no-code test automation platform for web, desktop, and SAP using flowchart-based test design.

seo.title: Leapwork — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Leapwork: Leapwork — Visual no-code test automation platform for web, desktop, and SAP using flowchart-based test design.

when_to_use: No-code visual test automation for SAP and desktop apps
Flowchart-based test design for non-technical QA teams
Cross-application test scenarios spanning web and desktop
Regression testing without writing a single line of code

pros: Covers web, desktop and SAP in one tool
Appealing to non-engineer QA and ops
cons: Proprietary format, limited version control story
Scales poorly to very large suites
Ceiling hits fast with custom logic
review.verdict: Good fit for enterprise ops and SAP automation, a bad fit for dev-led test automation.
review.best_for: Enterprise QA/ops teams automating SAP and legacy desktop apps
review.not_for: Engineering-led teams who should be writing code-based tests

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
